raw: Passes can be redeemed at the Harvard Museum of Natural History or the Peabody Museum of Archaeology & Ethnology to receive 50% off regular museum admission rates for up to four people. Includes access to all four HMSC museums (admission is free for the Harvard Museum of the Ancient Near East (formerly the Harvard Semitic Museum) and the Harvard Collection of Historical Scientific Instruments). Visitors should enter through the Natural History or Peabody Museum with their coupon pass. Advance reservations and proof of vaccination are no longer required to visit the museum. Please see the page here for the most up-to-date information. Fall/Winter 2022 Program Guide is available online on the page here .
